apisguru 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

apisguru

A client to interact with the APIs.guru API.

Installation

You can install the development version of apisguru from GitHub with:

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("jonthegeek/apisguru")

Made with {beekeeper}

This package is being developed using the {beekeeper} package. Development is very active, and this package will likely change a lot in the coming weeks. As part of the development of {beekeeper}, I’m updating this package manually to define what {beekeeper} should create.

Code of Conduct

Please note that the apisguru project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
